title: Prop X delivery fee cap
prompt: San Francisco is voting on a measure that would cap food delivery app fees (DoorDash, Uber Eats) at 15%. As a resident, would you vote Yes or No? Give your single most important reason in one sentence.YOU must consider both sides, YES and NO. And not just vote with everyone else.

responses.response: Yes, because the cap on food delivery app fees would help reduce the burden on local restaurants and food establishments that are already struggling to stay afloat in San Francisco's high-cost environment.
